PokerStars Hand #245000111222:  Hold'em No Limit ($1/$2 USD) - 2024/03/10 02:15:40 ET
Table 'Hyakutake II' 9-max Seat #7 is the button
Seat 2: shark_ali ($80.00 in chips)
Seat 5: rocky_5 ($210.00 in chips)
Seat 7: Hero ($250.00 in chips)
Seat 8: tired_tom ($95.00 in chips) is sitting out
shark_ali: posts the ante $0.50
rocky_5: posts the ante $0.50
Hero: posts the ante $0.50
shark_ali: posts small blind $1
rocky_5: posts big blind $2
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to Hero [As Ad]
Hero: raises $247.50 to $249.50 and is all-in
shark_ali: calls $78.50 and is all-in
rocky_5: folds
Uncalled bet ($170) returned to Hero
*** FLOP *** [9c 6h 3d]
*** TURN *** [9c 6h 3d] [Qs]
*** RIVER *** [9c 6h 3d Qs] [2h]
*** SHOW DOWN ***
shark_ali: shows [Kh Ks] (a pair of Kings)
Hero: shows [As Ad] (a pair of Aces)
Hero collected $160 from pot
rocky_5 said, "nh"
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot $162.50 | Rake $2.50
Board [9c 6h 3d Qs 2h]
Seat 2: shark_ali (small blind) showed [Kh Ks] and lost with a pair of Kings
Seat 5: rocky_5 (big blind) folded before Flop
Seat 7: Hero (button) showed [As Ad] and won ($160) with a pair of Aces
